assertions.title: Chart of accounts — seed standard tree for new company

steps.action: POST /api/v1/superadmin/tenants/onboard with coaTemplateCode=MANUFACTURING for fresh tenant UTM4E3
steps.expected: Fresh tenant is created with a seeded chart of accounts and default period
Root account groups with nested children are returned

assertions.title: Default accounts auto-configured when chart seeded

steps.expected: Inventory, COGS, revenue, discount, and tax defaults are non-null and valid account IDs

assertions.title: Product creation auto-links to COGS/Revenue/Inventory accounts from company defaults

steps.action: POST /api/v1/catalog/brands then POST /api/v1/catalog/items without explicit account IDs
steps.expected: Created finished good inherits valuation/COGS/revenue IDs from company defaults

assertions.title: Account tree endpoint returns proper hierarchy

steps.expected: Root nodes have parentId null and populated children arrays
steps.observed: HTTP 200; firstRoot code=AST level=1 parentId=None childCount=10

steps.action: POST /api/v1/accounting/opening-balances with balanced CASH/OPEN-BAL CSV rows
steps.expected: Import succeeds with successCount > 0 and an opening-balance journal becomes visible from audit transactions

assertions.title: Guided onboarding flow — chart of accounts first

steps.action: Onboard UTM4E3, retrieve tenant-admin credentials from MailHog, rotate the password, then fetch /api/v1/accounting/accounts/tree
steps.expected: Seeded accounts are immediately available after onboarding

steps.action: POST /api/v1/dealers/import with one valid and one invalid row
steps.expected: Import result includes success/failure counts and row-level validation errors
steps.observed: HTTP 200; successCount=1 failureCount=1 errors=[{'rowNumber': 2, 'message': 'contactEmail: Provide a valid contact email; gstNumber: GST number must be a valid 15-character GSTIN; stateCode: State code must be exactly 2 characters'}]

steps.action: POST /api/v1/suppliers/import with one valid and one invalid row
steps.expected: Import result includes success/failure counts and row-level validation errors
steps.observed: HTTP 200; successCount=1 failureCount=1 errors=[{'rowNumber': 2, 'message': 'contactEmail: must be a well-formed email address; gstNumber: GST number must be a valid 15-character GSTIN; stateCode: State code must be exactly 2 characters'}]

assertions.title: Opening stock import with accounting journal

steps.action: Create WIP/labor/overhead accounts, create a finished-good SKU with readiness metadata, then POST /api/v1/inventory/opening-stock with Idempotency-Key/openingStockBatchKey
steps.expected: Import succeeds and posts the opening stock journal
steps.observed: HTTP 409; reason=Opening stock import is disabled; enable migration mode to proceed.

issues.blockedBy: POST /api/v1/inventory/opening-stock returned HTTP 409 with reason 'Opening stock import is disabled; enable migration mode to proceed.'.

steps.action: Reuse the balanced opening-balance CSV import from VAL-COA-006
steps.expected: The import validates and returns detailed results while creating a traceable opening-balance transaction
steps.observed: HTTP 200; response data={'successCount': 2, 'failureCount': 0, 'accountsCreated': 0, 'errors': []}; latest audit transaction={'journalEntryId': 2, 'referenceNumber': 'OPEN-BAL-UTM4E3-d6c5c767bd91', 'entryDate': '2026-04-07', 'status': 'POSTED', 'module': 'ACCOUNTING', 'transactionType': 'GENERAL_JOURNAL', 'memo': 'Opening balance import', 'dealerId': None, 'dealerName': None, 'supplierId': None, 'supplierName': None, 'totalDebit': 500.0, 'totalCredit': 500.0, 'reversalOfId': None, 'reversalEntryId': None, 'correctionType': None, 'consistencyStatus': 'OK', 'postedAt': '2026-04-07T00:18:10.096566Z'}

assertions.title: Product catalog bulk import with auto-account linkage

steps.action: POST /api/v1/catalog/import with one row, then search the imported item with includeReadiness=true
steps.expected: Imported product is searchable and linked to valuation/COGS/revenue accounts

frictions.description: /api/v1/superadmin/tenants/coa-templates still returns COMPANY_CONTROL_ACCESS_DENIED for the platform super-admin because the path is treated as a company-bound control route by CompanyContextFilter.
frictions.resolution: Skipped the broken template-listing route and used the known active template code MANUFACTURING directly in POST /api/v1/superadmin/tenants/onboard.

frictions.description: New tenant-admin accounts are provisioned with mustChangePassword=true, which blocks accounting routes until the password is rotated.
frictions.resolution: Logged in once with the emailed temporary password, called POST /api/v1/auth/password/change, then re-authenticated with a stable validation password before continuing.

frictions.description: GET /api/v1/accounting/journal-entries and GET /api/v1/accounting/journals return HTTP 500 after the opening-balance import on disposable tenants.
frictions.resolution: Used GET /api/v1/accounting/audit/transactions as the user-surface proof for the created opening-balance journal instead of the broken journal list routes.

blockers.description: Opening stock import remains disabled in the compose-backed runtime because the app container is not wired to accept the feature toggle through docker-compose.yml.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Recreated the local app container with ERP_INVENTORY_OPENING_STOCK_ENABLED=true in the shell, but docker-compose.yml does not pass that variable into the app service, so the endpoint still returned the same 409 migration-mode-disabled response.

summary: Tested 11 runtime COA/onboarding assertions on fresh tenant UTM4E3: 10 passed and 1 was blocked because the compose-backed runtime keeps /api/v1/inventory/opening-stock disabled.
